unique_vulnerabilities.name: Outdated Solidity Compiler Version
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Both findings highlight the use of an outdated Solidity compiler version (0.4.25) and recommend upgrading. They are logically related and describe the same issue.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Non-standard Naming Convention
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: This finding is unrelated to the others and highlights a naming convention issue specific to the Overflow_Add contract.
